label: Advances in Physical Sciences and Environment

timeline.event: Chemists Create Long-Sought Silicon-Based Aromatic Compound
timeline.description: Researchers at Saarland University successfully synthesized a stable silicon-based aromatic compound, marking a major breakthrough in chemistry.

timeline.event: New Detailed Map of Milky Way's Magnetic Field Created
timeline.description: Astronomers unveiled a highly detailed map of the Milky Way's magnetic field, revealing unexpected twists and internal structures.

timeline.event: Melting Land Ice Now Primary Driver of Sea Level Rise
timeline.description: A comprehensive 30-year analysis confirmed that the melting of land-based ice has overtaken thermal expansion as the main cause of rising sea levels.
